chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-5630 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ D/o matter For hearing of CMA No.21535/2025 04.02.2026. Mr. Maqbool ur Rehman, Advocate for the Petitioner --------------- Despite issuance of notice no one is in attendance and no Counter Affidavit has been filed in opposition to the listed application which seeks return of the surety deposited in pursuance of the Order dated 11.11.2024. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petition was subsequently disposed of on 24.09.2025 in view of the Judgment of the Lahore High Court which was then upheld by the Supreme Court, with it being directed by the learned Divisional Bench that the Petitioner’s Appeal was to be entertained without asking for deposit of any adjudged amount. In view of the foregoing, the application stands allowed. The Nazir may return the surety document to the depositor subject to proper verification/identification and fulfilment of codal formalities. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
